flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Dunwoody College of Technology rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($23.9k → $27.8k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Dunwoody College of Technology rose 157% between 2021 and 2024 (33.3% → 85.7%).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Dunwoody College of Technology fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).
